nasb.text: Jesus said to him, “Truly I say to you that this very night, before a rooster crows, you will deny Me three times.”

esv.text: Jesus said to him, “Truly, I tell you, this very night, before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“我實在告訴你，今天晚上雞叫以前，你會三次不認我。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实在告诉你，今夜鸡叫以前，你会三次不认我。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“我确实地告诉你：今天晚上鸡叫以前，你会三次不认我。”
